positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a majestic, whimsical forest creature, a blend of fox and deer, sitting peacefully amongst glowing mushrooms and delicate ferns. The style is clean, continuous single-line drawing (one-line art) with stark contrast and elegant negative space. The composition is centered and balanced, designed to be a standalone, impactful print on a shirt. Use a monochromatic palette of deep indigo and brilliant white, emphasizing high contrast and graphic simplicity. Flat, vector-style rendering, perfect for textile printing, with strong, visible silhouettes and no complex shading. High detail, UHD, nature core, celestial glow, elegant, geometric, Zentangle-inspired.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, signature, cropped, low quality, poorly drawn, disfigured, artifact, noise, extra limbs, badly rendered hands, bad anatomy, grainy, gradient, 3d, photorealistic, complex shading
